changes: Steel Cyclone: HP absorption has been increased.
Fell Cleave: Inner Beast, Steel Cyclone, and Unchained will now be replaced by these actions when using Deliverance. As such, they can no longer be set to the hotbar.
Decimate: Inner Beast, Steel Cyclone, and Unchained will now be replaced by these actions when using Deliverance. As such, they can no longer be set to the hotbar.
Inner Release: Inner Beast, Steel Cyclone, and Unchained will now be replaced by these actions when using Deliverance. As such, they can no longer be set to the hotbar.

Shake it Off: Effect changed to create a barrier around self and all nearby party members that absorbs damage totaling 8% of maximum HP. Dispels Thrill of Battle, Inner Beast, Vengeance, and Raw Intuition, increasing damage absorbed by 4% for each effect removed. Duration: 15s. Recast time increased from 60 to 90 seconds.
True Thrust: Potency increased from 150 to 160.
Vorpal Thrust: Combo potency increased from 240 to 250.
Impulse Drive: Potency increased from 190 to 200.
Heavy Thrust: Potency increased from 140 to 150. Potency when executed from a target's flank increased from 180 to 190. Increased damage effect reduced from 15% to 10%.
Full Thrust: Combo potency increased from 440 to 450.
Dragon's Eye: Dragon Gauge maximum reduced from 4 to 3 units.
Jump: Potency increased from 250 to 260.
Disembowel: Combo potency increased from 230 to 240.
Doom Spike: Potency increased from 130 to 140. Area of effect increased.
Spineshatter Dive: Potency increased from 200 to 210.
Chaos Thrust: Combo potency increased from 230 to 240. Combo potency when executed from a target's rear increased from 270 to 280.
Dragonfire Dive: Potency increased from 300 to 320.
Blood of the Dragon: Can no longer be executed while under the effect of Life of the Dragon.
Fang and Claw: Potency increased from 250 to 260. Potency when executed from a target's flank increased from 290 to 300.
Wheeling Thrust: Potency increased from 250 to 260. Potency when executed from a target's rear increased from 290 to 300.
Geirskogul: Potency increased from 220 to 230. Recast time reduced from 35 to 30. Requirement for the additional effect changed from 4 to 3 Dragon Eye units.
Sonic Thrust: Combo potency increased from 170 to 180. Area of effect increased.
Mirage Dive: Potency increased from 200 to 210.
Nastrond: Potency increased from 320 to 330.
Life of the Dragon: Now states the Dragon Gauge only requires 3 units to receive the Life of the Dragon status after using Geirskogul.
Doton: Addressed issue where Dripping Blades II increased damage. Potency increased from 40 to 45.
Shukuchi: Time required to execute action reduced.
Rook Autoturret: Hypercharge effect increasing target's damage taken increased from 5% to 6%.
Bishop Autoturret: Hypercharge effect increasing target's damage taken increased from 5% to 6%.
Summon: Cast time reduced from 6 to 3 seconds. MP cost reduced.
Summon II: Cast time reduced from 6 to 3 seconds. MP cost reduced.
Summon III: Cast time reduced from 6 to 3 seconds. MP cost reduced.
Tri-bind: Dreadwyrm Trance effect "removes bind effect, increases potency by 70, and reduces MP cost" added. Cast time reduced from 3 to 2.5 seconds.
Ruin III: Potency reduced from 150 to 130. MP cost reduced. "No cast time while in Dreadwyrm Trance" effect added.
Ruin IV: Cast time made instant.
Aetherpact: Recast time increased from 90 to 120 seconds. No longer requires a party member within 30 yalms.
Devotion: Changed effect to: "increases damage dealt and reduces damage taken by all party members within a 30-yalm radius by 2%. Also increases healing magic potency of all party members by 5%."
Ruin Mastery: Now acquired at level 54. Effect changed to "changes Ruin to Ruin III." Activation requirement removed.
Sustain: Re-added as a level 18 action.
Enhanced Ruin II (Trait): New trait added at level 62. Grants 15% chance that a pet action will trigger Further Ruin, upgrading Ruin II to Ruin IV.
Summon: Cast time reduced from 6 to 3 seconds. MP cost reduced.
Summon II: Cast time reduced from 6 to 3 seconds. MP cost reduced.
Adloquium: MP cost reduced.
Succor: MP cost reduced. Barrier effect increased from 100% to 150% of HP restored.
Fey Caress: When in Sic mode, Selene will now activate Fey Caress when inflicted with an enfeeblement that can be removed with this skill.
Sustain: Added as a level 18 action.
Added new action: Thrill of War (Increases maximum HP of self and nearby party members by 10% and restores HP by 10%; Duration: 10s).
Removed action: Inner Release.
Adjusted Butcher's Block: Resolved an issue where it was benefiting adrenaline rush damage.
Adjusted Defiance: Resolved an issue where it was not increasing HP recovery via healing magic to the correct value.
Added new action: Dragon Sight (Grants Right Eye to self and Left Eye to target party member, increasing damage dealt by 10% for both; Duration: 10s).
Adjusted Skewer: Additional effect changed from reducing target's attack magic and healing magic potency by 20% to reducing target's attack potency and healing magic potency by 10%.
Adjusted Dragon's Eye: Dragon Gauge maximum reduced from 4 to 3 units.
Adjusted Blood of the Dragon: Recast time reduced from 10 to 5 seconds.
Adjusted Geirskogul: Potency reduced from 2,000 to 1,500; Recast time reduced from 10 to 5 seconds; Dragon Gauge cost reduced from 4 to 3.
Adjusted Nastrond: Potency reduced from 3,000 to 2,500; Recast time reduced from 10 to 5 seconds; Dragon Gauge cost reduced from 4 to 3.
Adjusted Life of the Dragon: Now states the Dragon Gauge only requires 3 units to receive the Life of the Dragon status after using Geirskogul.
Removed action: Battle Litany.
Resolved an issue where Geirskogul and Nastrond would sometimes miss the target.
Added new action: Troubadour (Adds an additional effect to the song currently being sung; Duration: 10s; Can only be executed while singing Army's Paeon or the Wanderer's Minuet).
Adjusted Repelling Shot: Additional effect 'bind' has been added.
Removed action: Battlefield March.
Added new action: Flamethrower (Delivers damage over time to all enemies in a cone; Potency: 250; Duration: 10s).
Removed action: Report.
Added new action: Vercure (Restores target's HP; Cure Potency: 1,500; Additional Effect: Grants Dualcast).
Adjusted Verstone: Increase to White Mana changed from 10 to 15.
Adjusted Veraero: Increase to White Mana changed from 10 to 15.
Adjusted Verfire: Increase to Black Mana changed from 10 to 15.
Adjusted Verthunder: Increase to Black Mana changed from 10 to 15.
Adjusted Verholy: Additional effect 'restores 1,500 MP' has been added.
Adjusted Verflare: Additional effect 'restores 250 TP' has been added.
Adjusted Flunge: TP cost reduced from 300 to 250.
Adjusted Monomachy: Duration changed to 10 seconds; Recast time increased from 10 to 45 seconds.
Adjusted Corps-a-corps: Additional effect 'reduces recast time by 5s if used on target suffering from a Monomachy effect inflicted by you' has been added.
Adjusted Displacement: Additional effect 'reduces recast time by 5s if used on target suffering from a Monomachy effect inflicted by you' has been added.
Removed action: Manafication.
Added new action: Sleeve Draw (Executes Draw and Minor Arcana in succession; Duration: 30s; Additional Effect: Restores 1,000 MP).
Added new mechanic: Minor Arcana (Converts drawn arcanum into Lord of Crowns or Lady of Crowns).
Removed actions: Draw, Deorbit.
Adjusted Holy Spirit: Additional effect 'increases Oath Gauge by 5' has been added.
Adjusted Requiescat: Duration reduced from 10 to 6 seconds; Additional effect 'reduces MP cost of all spells to 0' has been added.
Adjusted Tenka Goken: Action now requires a target.
Adjusted Shukuchi: The time required to execute this action has been reduced.
Adjusted Energy Drain: Recast time increased from 1 to 3 seconds.
Adjusted Assize: Resolved an issue where the PvP trait 'Increased Healing Potency' was benefiting this action.

new_content.description: Automatic level adjustment system for Kojin beast tribe quests.

housing.name: Hingan Fire Pit
housing.description: An indoor-use square fire pit complete with cookpot and utensils.

housing.name: Ixion Trophy

housing.name: Hingan Andon Lamp
housing.description: A small cubic lamp commonly placed on desks and tables.

housing.name: Kimono Hanger
housing.description: A wooden rack for displaying kimono.

housing.description: An adequately crafted imitation of a legendary Hingan katana.

housing.name: Hingan Brushes
housing.description: Several calligraphy brushes of varying thickness.

housing.name: Hingan Scrolls
housing.description: There is nothing like a stack of scrolls to impress your friends and intimidate your enemies.

housing.name: Porcelain Vase
housing.description: An extremely fragile vase of Hingan design.

housing.name: Stuffed Kojin
housing.description: Not an actual stuffed Kojin. Probably.

housing.description: A playful vase resembling the Mandragoras's knight.

housing.name: Tomato King Flower Vase
housing.description: A playful vase resembling the Mandragoras's king.

housing.name: Imitation Oblong Window
housing.description: The next best thing to a real window, without all the fuss.

housing.name: Hingan Chochin Lantern
housing.description: A round paper lantern with a handle attached for easy transportation.

housing.name: Hingan Wall Scroll
housing.description: This ornate scroll features a famous poem written in ancient Hingan.

housing.name: Decorative Wall Fan
housing.description: A colorful Hingan folding fan meant for display on one's wall.

housing.name: Fool's Portal
housing.description: A highly detailed painting made to look like an actual round window.

housing.name: Imitation Stained Crystal Ornament
housing.description: A colorful wall ornament made from glass instead of crystals.

housing.name: Shinryu's Wing
housing.description: A replica of the legendary worm's wing made from scales of the creature itself. Will look amazing on any wall, providing there is sufficient space for this massive tribute.
